creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
As part of the ongoing autotools reworking, migrate away from
autoconf-2.5x to autoconf-2.61 (leaving autoconf-2.13 for legacy reasons).

Fix: 

http://freebsd.lovett.com/patches/autotools-latest.diff
(currently 20070925 - MD5 is f6f83316b332892b3e26c6a8f89d2a7d)

Tinderbox results can be found at http://tinderbox.lovett.com/

There are a couple of transient perl leftovers, two ports have
real leftovers (one as a result of this change, the other not, maintainers
have been contacted).

The three port failures are also present on a unmodified tree.
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
